meta.notes: Example homepage blueprint built from the approved system.

sections.purpose: Introduce value proposition and primary CTA.

layout.notes: Two-column hero on desktop, stacked on mobile.

sections.notes: Typography should follow the approved display scale.

sections.purpose: Provide quick proof with 3-4 key metrics.

layout.notes: Metrics cards can collapse to a single column on small screens.

sections.notes: Composite may be added as a reusable metric-card group.

new_composites.name: metric-card-group
new_composites.purpose: Wrap repeated KPI cards into a reusable homepage section.
new_composites.notes: Should still compose from card + text + badge primitives.

acceptance_criteria: Uses approved typography and semantic colors.
Reuses existing components before introducing new composites.
Remains readable and coherent across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports.
Primary CTA remains visually dominant without breaking the calm visual language.
